goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'golden wok'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '12:15' on 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 17:15' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called golden wok
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 12:15 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 17:15 and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
